description: Animates changing the compass radius (arm tip distance) to a new value
utility: Adjust the compass opening to a new radius before drawing

arguments.name: newRadius
arguments.description: The new radius value for the compass

examples.scenario: Set compass radius to 5 then draw a circle
Change compass radius between two arcs
examples.expression: G = g2d(-10, 10, -10, 10); compassarc(G, point(G, 0, 0), radius(3)); compassradius(G, 6); compassarc(G)
